security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1421; img-src 'self' asset: data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A native Windows music player for local and online libraries.
bundle.longDescription: GXPlayer is a native desktop music player with local-library playback, isolated community music sources, caching, lyrics and Windows media controls.
